mapper.select:
SELECT history_date, history_type, history_content, point_change FROM (
SELECT cp.created_date AS history_date, '쿠폰' AS history_type, cp.name AS history_content, -cp.price AS point_change FROM coupon_purchase cp WHERE cp.student_id = (SELECT id FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId})
UNION ALL
SELECT gp.created_date AS history_date, '지급' AS history_type, gp.content AS history_content, gp.point AS point_change FROM get_points gp WHERE gp.student_id = (SELECT id FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId})
UNION ALL
SELECT t.created_date AS history_date, '매수' AS history_type, s.name AS history_content, -(o.price * o.amount) AS point_change FROM transactions t JOIN orders o ON t.buy_order_id = o.order_id JOIN stocks s ON o.stock_id = s.stock_id WHERE o.student_id = (SELECT id FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId})
UNION ALL
SELECT t.created_date AS history_date, '매도' AS history_type, s.name AS history_content, (o.price * o.amount) AS point_change FROM transactions t JOIN orders o ON t.sell_order_id = o.order_id JOIN stocks s ON o.stock_id = s.stock_id WHERE o.student_id = (SELECT id FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId})
) history ORDER BY history_date DESC
